div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Haiti (Bailly-Blanchard)
div.p: Vice-President and representative of the French members of the Board of the National Bank of Haiti are cabling Scarpa to receive note, it having been agreed between Department of State and bank’s representatives that questions not yet settled in connection with plan of monetary reform can be discussed and definitely decided between them and Financial Adviser in Washington.
In view of this arrangement no reason is seen why Acting Financial Adviser should not immediately present note and bank immediately will have printed and ship out new gourdes.
